title: PrepareFollowupSpecsSpec
description:
Input spec for the ``prepare-followup-specs`` primitive (#278).

From submit-time state, pre-stage two small spec files into the
experiment dir — ``monitor_spec.json`` + ``aggregate_spec.json`` — so a
later ``/monitor-hpc`` and ``/aggregate-hpc`` can honor the pre-staged
spec instead of re-running the operator interview. Because monitor-flow
and aggregate-flow only strictly require ``run_id`` (they derive
cluster/ssh_target/remote_path/etc. from the run sidecar on disk), the
input is just ``run_id`` plus the optional ``cmd_sha`` staleness gate the
consuming skill validates against the journal, and the optional
``profile`` recorded in the aggregate spec.

experiment_dir.title: Experiment Dir
experiment_dir.description: Experiment directory the two pre-staged spec files (monitor_spec.json + aggregate_spec.json) are written into.

run_id.title: Run Id
run_id.description: Run id both followup specs target. The only field monitor-flow / aggregate-flow strictly require; everything else is derived from the run sidecar on disk.

cmd_sha.title: Cmd Sha
cmd_sha.description: cmd_sha staleness gate stamped into both specs. The consuming skill validates it against the journal before honoring the pre-staged spec; a mismatch (code changed since submit) means the spec is stale and the skill falls back to the interview.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Optional run profile (run_name) recorded in the aggregate spec. Null when no profile is known at submit time.
